E4Plus1.uk.description: DannyDonnieJoeyJonJordan: Adam and Barry find Erica's old collection of New Kids on the Block memorabilia in the cluttered garage and tease her mercilessly. (S2 Ep10)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Darryl Dawkins Dance: As the school dance approaches, Erica asks Beverly to help her find Barry a date to keep him away from her best friend Lainey. (S2 Ep11)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Don't Tell the Bride
E4Plus1.uk.description: The One with All the Pixies: Sam has £13k to spend on his pixie wedding to his love, Luanne. Will Luanne, who dreams of a traditional service, appreciate his scheme?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: Emotions flare as the McQueens gather for a family therapy session. Rex makes a gesture to repair the past, and one resident finds themselves in the wrong place at the wrong time.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: John Paul calls in a favour from his new friend Smithy, but can he be trusted? Dillon has a proposal for Donny, and a revelation leaves a relationship on shaky ground.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sheep.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: La Galleria 33 (Part 1/2): Gordon tries to help La Galleria 33, run by sisters Rita and Lisa, who blame the restaurant's failures on everything from tablecloths to the weather. (S6 Ep1) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: La Galleria 33 (Part 2/2): The saga of Boston eatery La Galleria 33 comes to a dramatic conclusion as Gordon Ramsay gives restaurant owners and sisters Rita and Lisa an ultimatum. (S6 Ep2) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Crazy Calls: Murray and Pop-Pop get answering machines but then wage a message war on each other. Beverly worries when Adam befriends some computer geeks. (S4 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Stefan King: Adam gets into trouble with Beverly for portraying her as a monster in a horror story, and Erica forces Barry to go to a Halloween costume dance with her. (S4 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Five Minutes: Mitch and Cam have five minutes to catch a flight, and Haley and Rainer are forced to re-evaluate their entire relationship in five minutes. (S8 Ep18)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Frank's Wedding: Frank Dunphy's Roaring Twenties-themed wedding day is finally here, and to get into the spirit, Phil gets the Dunphy clan to show up in costume. (S8 Ep19)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Mama Maria's: Gordon Ramsay visits Mama Maria's, a failing restaurant in Brooklyn, New York, where owner John is overwhelmed by running a business that's become stuck in the past. (S6 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine: Gordon's in Pennsylvania to help rescue a soul food restaurant that was opened 12 years ago by a retired special education teacher. (S6 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Payback: The squad decide that it's high time for Peralta to pay them back all the money they've lent him over the years. Santiago and Holt reopen an arson case. (S2 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Defense Rests: Sophia's job gets in the way of her relationship with Peralta. Deputy Chief Wuntch needs Captain Holt's help with a job recommendation. (S2 Ep14)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Margical Mystery Tour: The Springfield Library doesn't have enough books to help with the kids' research papers, so Marge steps in with some anecdotes on historical figures. (S15 Ep11/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Milhouse Doesn't Live Here Anymore: Milhouse moves away from town, and Bart comes to realise just how much his pathetic friend means to him. (S15 Ep12/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Spencer's Gift: Erica is jealous of Barry's outstanding performance when they both get after-school jobs at Spencer's gift shop selling novelty presents. (S4 Ep14)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: So Swayze It's Crazy: When Adam tries his hand at acting, an agent decides he's only good for nerd roles, so Beverly sets out to turn him into a heartthrob. (S4 Ep15)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Winner Winner Turkey Dinner: Jay's Thanksgiving toast honours the entire family on their recent successes, even though everyone knows that they aren't quite true. (S9 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Brushes with Celebrity: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan recount their celebrity encounters. When Phil shows a house to his musical hero, he's determined to make a good impression. (S9 Ep8)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Johnny and Dora: Peralta and Santiago go undercover to catch Brooklyn's most notorious identity thief, but working together brings them closer than ever before. (S2 Ep23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: New Captain: After Holt is transferred to the NYPD Department of Public Relations, the arrival of a new captain causes chaos at the precinct. (S3 Ep1)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Bart-Mangled Banner: The family are arrested after Bart accidentally moons the American flag and Marge says on national television that all of Springfield hates America. (S15 Ep21/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Fraudcast News: When Mr Burns is reported dead, all the media outlets say what they really think of him. But the announcement is premature, and Mr Burns takes revenge... (S15 Ep22/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: Prince is backed into a corner. Liberty leans on her friends as concerns about her new relationship rise. And a resident is overwhelmed with emotion.

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Moe Letter Blues: Moe writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are on holiday with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives... (S21 Ep21/23)

E4Plus1.uk.title: First Dates
E4Plus1.uk.description: Aspiring rapper Matt meets music producer Breda. Abbie warms up a tongue-tied Matt. And can dynamic grandma Karen give retired teacher Jim's dating game a much-needed boost? (S22 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time: Game of Talents, Line of Duty, Catfish UK: The TV Show, Cher & the Loneliest Elephant, and the News on Prince Philip's funeral. (S17 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On the box this time, Line of Duty, Snackmasters, Baby Surgeons: Delivering Miracles, The Art of the Joy of Sex, Dr Pimple Popper and BBC News (Dominic Cummings vs Boris). (S17 Ep10)

Film4.uk.title: Daredevil
Film4.uk.description: (2003) Superhero fantasy. Ben Affleck is a blind lawyer who turns vigilante by night. Jennifer Garner plays his lover and Colin Farrell the villain who endangers them both. Strong violence.

Film4.uk.title: Ghost Rider
Film4.uk.description: (2007) Nicolas Cage is Marvel's soul-hunting, hot-headed-biker antihero. When Mephistopheles's son starts causing trouble in hell, Ghost Rider is forced to sort it out. With Peter Fonda.

Film4.uk.title: Riders of Justice
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Darkly comic thriller with Mads Mikkelsen. A soldier recruits three geeks to help him hunt down his wife's killer. In Danish/subs.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: LumoTV: Deaf Jams: Rhythm and...
Film4.uk.description: ...Lyrics: Rapper MC Geezer teams up with drum 'n' bass icon Harry Shotta as best mates Luke and Lisa chase their dream. [SL]

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Devil at 4 O'Clock
Film4.uk.description: (1961) Drama. Spencer Tracy stars as an unfairly unpopular priest living on a volcanic South Sea island which is about to erupt. With Kerwin Matthews, Frank Sinatra and Barbara Luna.

Film4.uk.title: Censor Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Star Niamh Algar and director Prano Bailey-Bond talk about making their new psychological horror film, Censor.

Film4.uk.title: The Violent Men
Film4.uk.description: (1955) Cold War-influenced western starring Glenn Ford and Edward G Robinson. A smallholder stands alone against the expansionist plans and brutal tactics of a tyrannical rancher.

Film4.uk.title: Arabesque
Film4.uk.description: (1966) Gregory Peck stars in Stanley Donen's spy thriller. An Oxford professor is unwittingly drawn into a deadly web of political intrigue. With Sophia Loren and Alan Badel.

Film4.uk.title: Censor Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Star Niamh Algar and director Prano Bailey-Bond talk about making their new psychological horror film, Censor.

Film4.uk.title: Le Mans '66
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Oscar-winning sports drama starring Matt Damon and Christian Bale. In the 60s, Ford set out to build a car that can defeat Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans race.

Film4.uk.title: Knock at the Cabin
Film4.uk.description: (2023) M Night Shyamalan's jarringly intimate end-of-days horror with Dave Bautista. An armed group insist that a family of three must make an impossible life-or-death choice.

Film4.uk.title: Chevalier
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Exuberant historical costume drama. Kelvin Harrison Jr stars as prodigiously talented French-Caribbean swordsman and  composer Joseph Bologne, who literally out-fiddled Mozart.

Film4.uk.title: Blue Bayou
Film4.uk.description: (2021) Justin Chon's poignant drama about a man of Korean descent who is threatened with deportation from the US even though he was adopted into an American family when he was three.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Santa Fe
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Western starring Randolph Scott. Four brothers leave the defeated South to seek jobs as the US recovers from the Civil War. As one becomes a railwayman, the others turn to crime.

Film4.uk.title: The Black Arrow
Film4.uk.description: (1948) Historical adventure. A man (Louis Hayward) returns from the Wars of the Roses to learn from his uncle that a family friend has killed his father. But is everything as it seems?

Film4.uk.title: To Hell and Back
Film4.uk.description: (1955) Fact-based wartime drama. Audie Murphy, America's most decorated soldier in WWII, plays himself in this dramatic recreation of the valiant heroics that earned him the honours.

Film4.uk.title: Censor Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Star Niamh Algar and director Prano Bailey-Bond talk about making their new psychological horror film, Censor.

Film4.uk.title: Canyon Passage
Film4.uk.description: (1946) Frontier western starring Dana Andrews. An ambitious businessman journeys to rural Oregon where a complex web of life and love waits to ensnare him. Directed by Jacques Tourneur.

Film4.uk.title: Legends of the Fall
Film4.uk.description: (1994) Oscar-winning turn-of-the-century drama with Brad Pitt and Anthony Hopkins. A Montana patriarch's son falls for his brother's fiancée, setting off a tragic chain of events.

Film4.uk.title: A Man Called Otto
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Darkly-tinged but ultimately feel-good comedy starring Tom Hanks as a grumpy misanthrope who spends his time badgering people into following society's rules. But why is he like this?

Film4.uk.title: Our Kind of Traitor
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Thriller about a British couple who get drawn into a Russian mafia conspiracy. With Ewan McGregor, Naomie Harris, Stellan Skarsgård and Damian Lewis. Based on John le Carré's novel.

Film4.uk.title: Night of the 12th
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Award-winning, gritty true-crime drama following a faltering police investigation into the grisly murder of a young woman. With Bastien Bouillon and Bouli Lanners. In French/subs.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Shepherd of the Hills
Film4.uk.description: (1941) John Wayne stars as a moody young man living in the Ozarks who has sworn revenge on his long-absent father for deserting his mother. Then a kindly stranger appears on the scene...

Film4.uk.title: The Mouse That Roared
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Satirical comedy starring Peter Sellers (in a triple role) and the original Doctor Who, William Hartnell. The world's smallest state, Grand Fenwick, declares war on the USA.

Film4.uk.title: They Rode West
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

Film4.uk.title: Shenandoah
Film4.uk.description: (1965) Western. James Stewart stars as a wealthy Virginia farming patriarch trying to keep his family together and safe in the midst of the encroaching American Civil War.

Film4.uk.title: Oblivion
Film4.uk.description: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged planet Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

Film4.uk.title: Beau Is Afraid
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Joaquin Phoenix stars in Ari Aster's fantastical odyssey about an anxiety-riddled man-boy working his way through a variety of psychological horrors to visit his domineering mother.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: They Rode West
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1954) Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Shenandoah
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (1965) Western. James Stewart stars as a wealthy Virginia farming patriarch trying to keep his family together and safe in the midst of the encroaching American Civil War.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Oblivion
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged planet Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Beau Is Afraid
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2023) Joaquin Phoenix stars in Ari Aster's fantastical odyssey about an anxiety-riddled man-boy working his way through a variety of psychological horrors to visit his domineering mother.

SkyMix.uk.title: Star Trek: Voyager
SkyMix.uk.description: Riddles: When Tuvok is returning to the ship following an away mission, he is attacked by a mysterious enemy and suffers severe brain damage. (S6, Ep 6)
